scripts.postdeploy: wrangler d1 execute domain-drop-watcher --file=schema.sql --remote && node scripts/bootstrap-admin-token.mjs

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: **Required.** Break-glass admin bearer token. Auto-generated by `node scripts/bootstrap-admin-token.mjs` (run via `npm run postdeploy`). Rotate with `wrangler secret put ADMIN_TOKEN`.

SESSION_SECRET.description: **Required.** Signs session cookies. Auto-generated by `npm run postdeploy`. Rotate by deleting this secret and redeploying — invalidates all active sessions.
